title: Mini Template Engine Template Source Descriptor Schema
description: A lightweight metadata wrapper for a template source string. This schema checks the shape of a template descriptor; full template syntax is validated by Template.check(), the parser, or the CLI --check mode.

source.description: Raw template text containing literals, {{ variable }} tags, {% block %} tags, raw blocks, and comments.

name.description: Optional human-readable template name or path.

strict.description: When true, missing variables and invalid loop iterables should be treated as render errors.

autoescape.description: When true, rendered output is HTML-escaped unless explicitly marked safe.

expected_context_schema.description: Optional inline context contract for this template.
